release_notes: Skill 0.3.6. Smoother bridge connection: when the ~/claude_bridge folder isn't connected to a Cowork session yet, the skill now requests it directly — a one-click connect prompt via a folder-request tool (e.g. request_cowork_directory) — instead of asking you to hunt for it in the folder picker. Falls back to the manual prompt where no such tool exists, and to reading ~/claude_bridge directly on the host (Claude Code). Protocol unchanged (v0.2.5). Builds on 0.3.5's self-healing reconcile fix for the 'answers once, then goes silent' hang.
_doc: Skill update manifest. Consumed by the C2G Mac app's SkillUpdateManager. The 'stable' channel manifest lives at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carlanotech/Cloud2GroundAI/main/skill/manifest.json (or wherever the app is wired to look). Future versions overwrite this file; older versions stay accessible via git history. The payload_url is a fully-qualified URL to a zip archive containing the skill directory at its root (or one level of wrapping folder — the installer handles both).
_payload_sha256_note: Set to null in v0.2 manifests; v1.0+ manifests MUST include a SHA-256 of the payload zip. SkillUpdateManager logs a warning when the field is absent.
